waiting.title: Activating Ordinay
waiting.description: Complete payment in your browser. This app will activate automatically when payment finishes.

success.title: Activation complete
success.description: Your device is now activated. License details are ready.

freeSetup.title: Setting up free plan
freeSetup.description: Setting up your free plan. One moment...

choice.title: Activate Ordinay (optional)
choice.subtitle: Keep working on the free plan or activate when ready.
choice.description: Activation removes free plan limits so you can scale without interruptions.

bullets.limits: Remove free plan limits for clients, dossiers, and active tasks.

choice.footer: Ordinay stays usable without activation. Free plan limits will apply.

toast.title: Plan updated
toast.message: Your plan has been changed successfully.
